summary: Plan mode classification only: keep #90227 as the live canonical PR for the Zalo credentials Windows-test compatibility work, and keep #90280 as related distinct Zalo token-resolver test work. No close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutation is planned.

actions.reason: #90227 is still open and is the best representative for the credentials-test root cause; keep it as canonical without planning any mutation.
#90280 is related to the canonical family but has a distinct root scope, so it should stay open rather than be closed as a duplicate or superseded by #90227.
